title: Alaska SBDC Releases Compelling COVID-19 Impact Data on Small Businesses
summary: Alaska SBDC Releases Compelling COVID-19 Impact Data on Small Businesses Tourism and Hiring Present Ongoing Challenges for Alaskans Alaska – May 19, 2021 – The Alaska Small Business Development Center (Alaska SBDC) has released its preliminary COVID-19 impact survey results on small businesses spanning the state. A familiar story emerges from the data: COVID-19 has negatively impacted the hiring market and tourism-based...

title: Shareholder Opportunity for Board Seats
summary: May 18, 2021 – Sitnasuak Native Corporation (SNC) announces a Shareholder opportunity to run for the SNC Board of Directors during the 48 th Annual Meeting. The 48 th Annual Meeting of Shareholders is scheduled for Saturday, September 25, 2021. A total of four (4) directors will be elected for terms...

title: U.S. Department of the Interior briefing session on Alaska Native Vietnam Veteran Allotments
